title: Dermatlas MAF and QC pipeline parameters
description: This pipeline uses Nextflow to filter and QC variant calls for dermatlas. The JSON Schema was built using the nf-core pipeline schema builder.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

subcohorts.description: Map of subcohort names to their configuration. Each subcohort should have a sample_list property pointing to a TSV file with tumor-normal pairs.

run_signatures.description: Run SigProfilerExtractor per subcohort downstream of QC.

sigprofiler_outdir.description: Publish directory for SigProfiler outputs. Separate from `outdir` so signature results can live alongside (not inside) the variants_combined tree — DERMATLAS convention: `${PROJECT_DIR}/analysis/sigprofiler`.

sigprofiler_seed.description: Optional SigProfiler Seeds.txt for reproducible re-runs.

sigprofiler_subcohort_names.description: Map of subcohort key → legacy publish-dir name for SigProfiler outputs (e.g. onePerPatient → one_tumour_per_patient). Unmapped keys fall back to the raw key.
